subcodes.first_line: O cherished remnant of that sanctified soul! Though the letter thou didst dispatch through the post failed to arrive, yet thy second letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن نفس مقدس نامه که بتوسط پست ارسال نمودی نرسید ولکن نامه ثانی
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
